name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Expiry tracking — dashboard. New Expiry page: a fleet "expiring soon" pull-list (grouped by machine, colour-coded, adjustable window) plus a per-slot editor (pick machine → pick product → perishable toggle → add/remove dated batches with quantities). Bilingual EN/IS. Builds on the v4.76 data layer; still no kiosk change.
